Shai`din Revenant Bauble  
 

Lore Item
Slot: EAR
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 2
HP: +35 MANA: +35
Effect: Bobbing Corpse (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 1.5) at Level 49
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHD NEC
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Shai`din Revenant Bauble
Lore Item
Slot: EAR
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 2
HP: +35 MANA: +35
Effect: Bobbing Corpse (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 1.5) at Level 49
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHD NEC
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 3 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:3000
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 09:48:43
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 50

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
Battle Master Ska`tu


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Chardok


Uploaded March 13th, 2022 by halfridge
Updated March 14th, 2022
Send a correction
Post Comment
Nice item
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2004 at 12:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1718583422185
View User Forum
Scholar
36 posts
I've had this item since my early 50's on my SK, and plan on getting one for my necromancer as well. Can come in handy if you fight in airless zones like the grey and don't have worn eb. Especially after a rez when you might not have the mana to cast the actual spell or cast DMF. Just grab earring and click.
▲ Page top
Rather have this than the spell
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2003 at 8:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758041483
34 posts
Is there something I'm missing that would make this less valuable than the spell? From what I'm seeing, the effect on this item has a cast time of 1.5 seconds, whereas the actual spell is 6.0. This item costs no mana, whereas the spell costs 100. You can use this item 6 levels before the spell. Throw in the stats bonuses, and I would gladly pay the extra money for this item, and leave the spell on the vendor.

Please let me know if I'm missing something here....
▲ Page top
RE: Rather have this than the spell
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2003 at 12:24 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591755789514
61 posts
for necros, it's not that great since its a self only spell. You can still use it on yourself when you dont want to fry mana on DMF...

The real use I see is for SKs to just click in, since they dont get this spell until 55, and this is a free cast. The only difference between this and DMF is its self only, and no see invis
▲ Page top
RE: Rather have this than the spell
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2003 at 10:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758041483
34 posts
Sorry, I was speaking with Shadowknights in mind.

For Necros, this item isn't has valuable as it is to Shadowknights, since they get DMF at 44. I don't think Necros even get Bobbing Corpse.

Still, 35hp and 35 mana isn't too shabby
▲ Page top
RE: Rather have this than the spell
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2003 at 8:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256443049
View User Forum
1 post
If by spell you mean, DMF, it also has
see invis. I really like that additional
feature.

I killed him
QuoteReply
# May 18 2003 at 5:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256737799
View User Forum
45 posts
Went on a crappy raid to Chardok and got this, some necro got it, seems like an ok item. The named was easy 1 group take out
▲ Page top
Not bad
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2002 at 8:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
Bought one last night in the Bazaar for 250pp, so guess I got a good deal :). I figured that it was better than the 35HP/25MANA ear-ring but priced lower because of the weight, obviously not... shame I've got ten levels to go before the effect works, and will get DMF before that!
▲ Page top
My bad...
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 5:05 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1595175390216
Scholar
33 posts
I saw this in the Bazaar for 1K. I already maxed out my INT, and was well over the hard cap. So I figure I can swipe a quick 35mana and up my hitpoints by 35 at the same time.

I hunt in the Grey often. The bobbing corpse in 1.5 seconds sounded great. I could right click the whole party in just 10 seconds. Well oops, the affect is *self-only*.

This really made the utility of the item drop IMO. I can DMF myself, and it lasts longer and is better. Its not like I need to switch spell gems every 20 minutes, DMF lasts like an hour. For a SK in the 49 to 54 range, the piece has merit, but for 55+ SKs and DMF capable necromancers, don't bother unless you need a cheap way to up mana/hitpoints when capped out. Also useful as a junk buff filler.

Verant makes some wierd decisions, imagine the value of this earring if it was targetable or usable by say a warrior.
▲ Page top
RE: My bad...
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2003 at 8:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762584527
41 posts
A bunch of necros complaining about an item that is more for sk's, yes necros could use it if they only wanted the eb part of the effect, and didn't want to waste the mana, but the real deal here is sk's get this very spell but not until 55, and you can use this item at 49, that Makes it very nice for the sk's that could use the EB,Lev, and SvP....no see invis kinda sucks, but it doesn't ruin it for the sk's....
▲ Page top
RE: My bad...
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2003 at 8:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
"Its not like I need to switch spell gems every 20 minutes, DMF lasts like an hour"

Yeah, but it's still a pain when there are mobs sitting around waiting to be killed. I wouldn't have paid 3k plat for this ear-ring just for the clickable effect (as I said, I got it for 250pp), but unless I really need the poison resist of DMF I'd much rather just click the ear-ring than faff around swapping spells and recasting DMF when it runs out; I have a Harvester so the see invis isn't important either. So for me, with those stats, that effect and that price, it's a real bargain. Shame about the weight though.
▲ Page top
sweet
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2002 at 4:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782680436
17 posts
Im a lvl 49sk and this item rocks. Works at lvl 49, and SK gets the spell at 55. The Bobbing corpse gives you 20svd/Levitate/and water breathing. Imo this earring is damn awesome paid 2k for it on the nameless usually sells for about 4k
▲ Page top
sweet iteam
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 4:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1633306622282
429 posts
this things pretty sweet, works at lv 49 from what i hear, bobbing corpse is a 55 sk spell.

Paying 3k for one on A Ro

▲ Page top
Love this baby
QuoteReply
# May 08 2002 at 3:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250836089
121 posts
I got mine at 52 and it worked right off the bat.

I refered a good friend of mine to pick one up, and she did. She said it didn't work for her until she hit 49.

Hope that helps =)

(Also, phat earring... Helps tremendously on dispelling mobs... Naggy never touched one other buff save for this since the 1.5 casting time was done inbetween swings, and he'd just dispell that, so Aego/SoS were never even close to being touched... All my crap buffs were up too =P)
▲ Page top

General
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2002 at 7:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761128024
Scholar
66 posts
Passed this around to some fellow sk's in guild. The effect worked for a level 51, failed to work for a level 39. Bobbing Corpse is an amazing utility spell and I still use this earring at 59. Normal cast time for the Bobbing Corpse spell is 6 seconds or so and the earring effect takes somewhere between 1.5 and 2 seconds to cast.

wrong information
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 8:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774444051
1 post
This drop is both Shadow Knight and Necro wearable. I currently use one.
▲ Page top
necro only, sorry
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2001 at 1:58 PM Rating: Decent
Ravanta
34 posts
I wear this earring, and oddly enough it is necromancer only.

It's funny though, I have sold a few of the druid/ranger earrings (earring of woven bark) and it has the same stats, only differs with the effect of snare, and that one is druid/ranger equippable.

Why the bauble weighs 3 pounds when the other earrings weigh much less is beyond me. It's a decent earring if you don't need the pr or the see invis effect of dmf. (thats what fingerbone hoops are for) Click EB comes in handy when you die in the grey and need to get ressed. :)
▲ Page top
RE: necro only, sorry
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2005 at 1:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1657498617107
27 posts
Strange that it took 4 years before anyone noticed...

Quote:
-Click EB comes in handy when you die in the grey and need to get ressed.-

Quote end..

...i mean...clicky item...when dead...how?...item is...where?...
▲ Page top
Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 12:26 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Bobbing Corpse
Water Breathing
Levitate
Increase Poison Resist by 40 (L55)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Shd (L55)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Abjuration
Allowable Targets: Self

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 100
Spell Duration: 630 ticks (63.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 3
Casting Time: 6.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.50 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your skin shrivels.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso's skin shrivels.
Spell fades: Your skin returns to normal.
